# starts_with

Checks if a string starts with a given substring.

## Signature

`starts_with(_val: str, _start: str) -> bool`

## Examples

```rad
starts_with("hello world", "hello")  // -> true
starts_with("hello world", "world")  // -> false
```

## Category

strings
